techniques.name: none
techniques.description: No retrieval — the model answers from its own parametric memory only. The known-worst anchor.

techniques.name: dense
techniques.description: Dense retrieval: embed the query (bge-m3) and take the top-k KB paragraphs by cosine similarity.

techniques.name: dense_rerank
techniques.description: Dense retrieval + an LLM reranker (RankGPT-style) that reorders the top-k candidates before feeding the generator.

techniques.name: answer
techniques.description: Answer the question grounded in the retrieved context. The `model` knob selects which LLM (gemma3-4b / gpt-oss-20b / gpt-oss-120b).

techniques.name: on
techniques.description: Placebo (negative control): returns the answer unchanged. True effect is zero — CAFE must call it non-significant.

techniques.name: off
techniques.description: Placebo (negative control): returns the answer unchanged. The other level of the no-op control.

techniques.name: concise
techniques.description: Answer directly in one concise sentence.

techniques.name: cot
techniques.description: Chain-of-thought: reason step by step, then answer.
